[Heteromeles arbutifolia var. arbutifolia, moreHeteromeles arbutifolia var. cerina (Jeps.) E. Murray, Heteromeles arbutifolia var. macrocarpa (Munz) Munz, Heteromeles fremontiana Decne., Heteromeles salicifolia (C. Presl) Abrams, Photinia arbutifolia Lindl., Photinia arbutifolia var. cerina Jeps., Photinia salicifolia C. Presl]
